name: Emergency Stop Convention
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external emergency-stop convention crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: KILLSWITCH.md can document emergency shutdown protocols and stop conditions.
The convention can be mapped to fail-closed and runtime transition governance terms.
non_claims: KILLSWITCH.md does not prove transition admissibility.
Emergency-stop documentation does not automatically grant or revoke execution authority.
The wiki relationship record is not acceptance of equivalence.

transition_table_mapping.claims: emergency shutdown protocol, stop conditions, repository-root convention, operational safety boundary
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, or automatic authority change
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external convention posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: documented stop conditions and safety boundary
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct stop-condition relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform fail-closed review, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Fail-Closed, Runtime Transition Governance, Transition Table
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
